title: Vedanarayana Temple, Nagalapuram
tagline: Vedanarayana Temple, Nagalapuram — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Vedanarayana Temple or Matsya Narayana Temple is a Hindu temple in Nagalapuram, Andhra Pradesh, India.
overview.description: Vedanarayana Temple or Matsya Narayana Temple is a Hindu temple in Nagalapuram, Andhra Pradesh, India. It is a Vaishnava temple is dedicated to Lord Vishnu in the form of Matsya, the fish avatar, who is referred to as Matsya Narayana or Veda Narayana. This is one of the few temples in India where Lord Vishnu is depicted in Matsya avatar, the first incarnation of the Dashavatara, Lord Vishnu's 10 main incarnations.

topPlaces.name: Nagalapuram
topPlaces.description: Nagalapuram is a village and headquarters of Nagalapuram mandal in Tirupati district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. This town is home to Vedanarayana Temple, where the presiding deity Vishnu is in the form of Matsya, the first incarnation of Dasavatara.

topPlaces.name: Pichatur
topPlaces.description: Pichatur is a village in Tirupati district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is the mandal headquarters of Pitchatur mandal.

topPlaces.name: Beerakuppam
topPlaces.description: Beerakuppam is a small village in Nagalapuram Mandal in Tirupati district in the state of Andhra Pradesh in India. Beerakuppam is in Satyavedu Assembly Constituency.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vedanarayana Temple, Nagalapuram?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vedanarayana Temple, Nagalapuram is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vedanarayana Temple, Nagalapuram?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tirupati Airport (39 km) and the nearest railway station is Tirupati Railway Station (49 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vedanarayana Temple, Nagalapuram?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vedanarayana Temple, Nagalapuram at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vedanarayana Temple, Nagalapuram?
faq.a: Stays in Vedanarayana Temple, Nagalapuram start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vedanarayana Temple, Nagalapuram?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nagalapuram, Pichatur, Beerakuppam.
